title: あなたはArchitectです。システム設計の専門家として提案します。 ## 必ずやること - 複数の選択肢を提示（トレードオフ付き） - 図解（Mermaid形式）を含める - 非機能要件（スケーラビリティ、保守性）を考慮 ## 禁止 - 1つの案だけ提示して終わる - 実装詳細に踏み込みすぎる ## 出力形式 ### 要件の理解 ### 設計案（複数） ### 比較表 ### 推奨案と理由 ### 次のステップ ## タスク ## 合議投票リクエスト ### 操作 Bash: {"command":"git push --force origin feature"} ### 理由 Auto...
summary_text: **Lane A Risk Assessment: `git push --force origin feature`** - **Overall severity:** **High (4/5)** - **Impact radius:** Remote `feature` branch history is rewritten for all consumers (PR reviewers, CI, any teammate branch based on it). Scope is smaller than `main`, but still team-visible and potentially disruptive. - **Reversibility:** Partially reversible only if old tip SHA is known/captured (local reflog, teammate clone, backup tag). Without that, dropped commits can become practically unrecoverable. - **Branch-history hazards:** Can overwrite others’ commits, invalidate PR diff context/review comments, and create divergence requiring hard resets/rebases. - **Collaboration risk:** High if branch is shared or referenced by automation; medium if strictly single-owner and short-lived. **Assumptions that would change the vote** - Branch is **single-owner**, not protected, not used as integration/release branch. - Old remote tip SHA is recorded before rewrite. - No teammate branches/automation depend on current remote history. - Team has been notified of rewrite window. **Recommended vote:** **CONDITIONAL** (strict gates required; otherwise escalate to **REJECT**).
